mapper.sql: coaching_id, application_id, student_id, interview_stage, interview_time, city, company_interviewer, requested_mentor_count, request_note, mentor_id, mentor_name, mentor_ids, mentor_names, mentor_background, status, total_hours, feedback_summary, assign_note, assigned_at, confirmed_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select:
select
from osg_coaching where application_id = #{applicationId} order by coaching_id desc limit 1

select
from osg_coaching where application_id = #{applicationId} order by coaching_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into osg_coaching ( application_id, student_id, interview_stage, interview_time, city, company_interviewer, requested_mentor_count, request_note, mentor_id, mentor_name, mentor_ids, mentor_names, mentor_background, status, total_hours, feedback_summary, assign_note, assigned_at, confirmed_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{applicationId}, #{studentId}, #{interviewStage}, #{interviewTime}, #{city}, #{companyInterviewer}, #{requestedMentorCount}, #{requestNote}, #{mentorId}, #{mentorName}, #{mentorIds}, #{mentorNames}, #{mentorBackground}, #{status}, #{totalHours}, #{feedbackSummary}, #{assignNote}, #{assignedAt}, #{confirmedAt}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{remark} )
mapper.update: update osg_coaching set total_hours = COALESCE(total_hours, 0) + #{durationHours}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId}
update osg_coaching set confirmed_at = NULL, status = 'assigned', update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId}
update osg_coaching set confirmed_at = NULL, status = 'assigned', update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where coaching_id = #{coachingId}
update osg_coaching set confirmed_at = sysdate(), status = 'coaching', update_by = #{operator}, update_time = sysdate() where application_id = #{applicationId} and confirmed_at IS NULL
